name: codex-swarm-monitor
description: Operate the local Codex Swarm Monitor for realtime workspace observability.

interface.shortDescription: Start and connect the local Codex realtime monitor.
interface.longDescription: Codex Swarm Monitor provides an operational skill for starting the local realtime dashboard, running preflight checks, connecting a workspace, and verifying native hook observability.
defaultPrompt: Start the Codex Swarm Monitor for this workspace.
Run the monitor preflight checks for this folder.
Install monitor hooks and explain what Codex will observe.

screenshots.label: Realtime local workspace dashboard with Ralph loop analysis
